lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.
Note: Powerplay is live-service and rebalanced regularly — cross-check current territory and thresholds against a live tracker (EDPowerPlay / Inara) before committing a session.

sources.label: Inara — PP2.0 guide
sources.what: The comprehensive mechanics reference (ranks, modules, ethos, activities) this dossier's data is cross-checked against.

sources.label: Inara — Powerplay
sources.what: The live Powerplay galaxy state — every Power’s territory, cycle and control points.

sources.label: EDPowerPlay
sources.what: Live EDDN-fed dashboard — per-power control points, vulnerable systems, acquisition conflicts, weekly deltas.

sources.label: Powerplay Tools (SOTL)
sources.what: Ian Doncaster's Activities Reference Card — per-state activity matrix and precise control-point thresholds.

sources.label: EliteMeritTracker
sources.what: EDMC plugin that tracks merits per system live from the journal — session and all-time totals, system state.

sources.label: BGS-Tally
sources.what: EDMC plugin logging BGS, colonisation, Powerplay and Thargoid activity per session.

sources.label: Frontier
sources.what: Official Ascendancy (4.0.19.0) update notes — the source for Powerplay 2.0 mechanics, ranks, and perks.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous Fandom Wiki
sources.what: Community Powerplay reference — merit system, modifier changes across rebalance patches, and the Power-leader portrait images used on this page.

sources.label: Steam Guide — Superpowers & Major Factions
sources.what: Community new-player overview of the three superpowers, the powers, and Powerplay/BGS basics.

sources.label: YouTube — Mile 13 Gaming
sources.what: Full Powerplay 2.0 walkthrough from the Ascendancy update: pledging to a Power, the merit system, and unlocking exclusive modules.

sources.label: YouTube — Mile 13 Gaming
sources.what: Guide to earning Powerplay 2.0 merits efficiently by folding them into your existing activity loops rather than grinding separately.

sources.label: YouTube — Mile 13 Gaming
sources.what: Tutorial on completing the Power Commodities task, one of the merit-generating Powerplay 2.0 activities.
